## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `./scripts/check`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I updated docs for architecture, install, settings, diagnostics, or release behavior when relevant.
- [ ] Note mutations still emit the correct SSE event.
- [ ] Core local dictation still works without OpenRouter.
- [ ] User text transformations remain previewable or reversible.

## Risk

Call out user-facing risks, migration risks, platform-specific behavior, or follow-up work.
